creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Brian Scott from comment #9)
> Sorry, here it is (r335317, latest snapshot build):
> [ thread pid 12 tid 100013 ]
> Stopped at      dyn_tick+0x7c:  ldr     x14, [x14]

Ok, do you able to inspect the core dump with kgdb?
What line will show the following command?

kgdb> l *dyn_tick+0x7c

Also, do you have VIMAGE in your kernel? Is it GENERIC?
